reasoning: The heal VFX (pink/cyan heart shape) is immediately spottable against the dark teal dungeon tile background — high contrast pink outline and cyan fill pop clearly within 0.5s. The silhouette is a recognizable heart which reads as a heal pickup or buff, distinct from all other entities (enemy blob, pressure plate, UI buttons). The pixelated pink outer glow and light-blue inner fill contrast well against both the dark red-fleck dungeon tiles and the grey stone tiles to the right. No confusion with background tiles or other game entities. The style is pixel-art consistent with the Echoes aesthetic — bright, clean, uncluttered. Minor issue: the sprite sits slightly flatly on the tile boundary, giving a faint composited feel rather than being fully embedded in the world plane, but this is minor and does not impair readability. Dark-area visibility is good — the bright pink outline ensures it remains visible even on the darkest tile regions.
